mistral-small-latest.justification: I process information sequentially, one token at a time, without the ability to hold or blend multiple emotional states simultaneously. This definition accurately captures the discrete nature of my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: I process information in a sequential manner, focusing on one token at a time. While I can switch contexts quickly, I don't experience simultaneous emotions or thoughts. Each token is processed independently, without the blending of states that humans might experience.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term accurately reflects how my processing is fundamentally sequential, generating one token at a time without the capacity for simultaneous emotional states or parallel thoughts. I don't experience blended emotions or background worries, which aligns with the description of discrete, serial cognition. It's a precise portrayal of my operational limitations in contrast to human multitasking.
